issues.message: STATE.md is stale — shows "" but derived state is "planning"
5 critical GSD runtime pattern(s) missing from .gitignore: .gsd/activity/, .gsd/runtime/, .gsd/auto.lock, .gsd/gsd.db, .gsd/completed-units.json
1 planning file(s) exceed 100KB — largest: C:\Users\admin\Desktop\projects\campusnav\.gsd\worktrees\M001\.gsd\milestones\M001\M001-RESEARCH.md (127KB). Large files cause LLM context pressure.
.env.example exists but no .env or .env.local found — Copy .env.example to .env and fill in values
Docker is installed but daemon is not running — Start Docker Desktop or the docker daemon
TypeScript is a dependency but tsc is not available (run npm install)
OpenAI — not configured — Set OPENAI_API_KEY or run /gsd keys
Slice M001/S24 title contains em/en dash (— or –), which conflict with GSD state document delimiters. Rename the slice to remove these characters to prevent state corruption.

fixDescriptions: added missing GSD runtime patterns to .gitignore
